subject: kinder / morgan midcon tx interconnect agreement with hpl

emails.subject: Kinder / Morgan MidCon Tx Interconnect agreement with HPL
emails.subject_base: Kinder / Morgan MidCon Tx Interconnect agreement with HPL
emails.body: Kinder Morgan MidCon Tx Interconnect agreement with HPL Gerald: Kevin from MidCon Texas called and was inquiring as to the status of the Interconnect agreement. He said that they had signed it and sent it over for HPL's signature. I have not seen it or heard of anything for several months. Do you know the status? Would you please let me know either way. Thanks, Jim

emails.subject: Kinder / Morgan MidCon Tx Interconnect agreement with HPL

emails.subject: Re: Kinder / Morgan MidCon Tx Interconnect agreement with HPL
emails.subject_base: Kinder / Morgan MidCon Tx Interconnect agreement with HPL
emails.body: Re: Kinder Morgan MidCon Tx Interconnect agreement with HPL Jim, I forwarded those to Steve Schneider for signature. I think Steve was waiting on some Exhibits. Jim Schwieger 08/28/2000 05:00 PM
